magical_eye.title: Craft the Magical Eye (center: lacrima + cursium + ignitium + spellweave variants + divine_pearl)

place_magical.title: Place the Magical Eye in the End Portal frame

subtitle.text: Magic that was forced to be still. Now it moves again, in the frame.

description: The Magical Eye is the Ocean Mages' inheritance.
They merged magic with the ocean at scale.
The Leviathan is what remained when the civilization dissolved completely.
The recipe requires the Leviathan's spellweave (confirmed drop),
and the full Cataclysm chain's ignitium and cursium.
Seven or more frame slots filled, depending on your progress.
The portal is beginning to feel like a gate.
→ Place it in the End Portal frame [check]
